sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel movement data documented for NES version

special_mechanics.name: Hurricane Kick
special_mechanics.description: New move added in Double Dragon II; directional-based attack

special_mechanics.name: Directional Attack System
special_mechanics.description: Replacement of original punch/kick buttons with Left Attack and Right Attack buttons. Pressing attack button in current direction performs standard punch series; pressing opposite direction performs back kick

special_mechanics.name: Fall Damage
special_mechanics.description: Player loses one life if falling off bottom of screen or into pit/spikes

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Sources focus on gameplay mechanics, level design, regional differences, and debug features rather than technical movement values. NES version is described as 'very distinct product' from arcade original but no movement specifications provided.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Double Dragon II: The Revenge (NES)
Wikipedia - Double Dragon II: The Revenge
